name: ACUITY INC. (DE)
business: Acuity Inc. is a market-leading industrial technology company. Through its two business segments, Acuity Brands Lighting (ABL) and Acuity Intelligent Spaces (AIS), it designs, manufactures, and brings to market products and services including lighting, lighting controls, building management solutions, and an audio, video, and control platform.
sellsTo: new construction, renovation and retrofit, and maintenance and repair applications
North America and select international markets
electrical distributors, consumer retailers, large corporate accounts, original equipment manufacturers (OEMs), system integrators

non-residential and residential construction, including commercial, institutional, industrial, infrastructure, retail, airports, universities, enterprise campuses, sports venues, themed entertainment, hospitality

exposures.sentence: Our Distech Controls intelligent Building Management Systems (BMS) provide management of a space through controls, sensors, and software.
Our mission at AIS is to make spaces smarter, safer, and greener through our strategy of connecting the edge with the cloud using disruptive technologies.
Additionally, the market for artificial intelligence and software solutions is active with a wide range of competitors, from existing large companies to startup organizations.

We have also experienced compromises of our security, and could experience in the future, a compromise of our security for reasons including technical system flaws, the improper installation of an upgrade or update, the proper installation of an upgrade or update that has consequences unforeseen by us or the software provider, data input or record-keeping errors, or tampering or manipulation of our systems by employees or unauthorized third parties, such as through viruses, malware, or phishing.

We utilize a variety of raw materials and components in our production process including steel, aluminum, lamps, certain rare earth materials, microchips, light emitting diodes (LED), LED drivers, ballasts, wire, electronic components, power supplies, petroleum-based byproducts, natural gas, and copper.

Sales of our products and services depend significantly on the level of activity in new construction and renovation/retrofits.
Demand for our products is highly dependent on economic drivers, such as consumer spending and discretionary income, along with housing construction and home improvement spending.
